_meta.stability: Frozen for the weft-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic dashboard counterpart — scanners are exposed only via MCP (list_scanners) and CLI in the classic generation. Weft drops MCP's 'errors' and 'hint' siblings per the strict envelope.

shape_decl.rationale: ScannerWeft mirrors ScannerConfig.to_dict() (name/description/file_types). 'name' is the entity's logical primary key but already a string-name; no rename per the weft-vocabulary scope.
